rationale: The app is used by night-shift workers in parking lots. It requires high contrast, reduced glare, and large tap targets for fast, reliable field use.

headings.usage: H1 for App Title, H2 for Screen Titles. Tracking-tight.

body.usage: General UI text, inputs, button labels.

mono.usage: License plates, dates, times, data numbers.

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing for tap targets (min 56px height for main actions). Mobile-first, single-column stack with gap-4 to gap-6.
spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto p-4 sm:p-6 min-h-screen flex flex-col
spacing_and_layout.buttons: h-14 rounded-md flex items-center justify-center font-bold text-lg
spacing_and_layout.borders: max 8px border-radius (rounded-md). Use 1px solid borders to define depth instead of shadows.

components.button: Shadcn Button, override height to h-14, text-lg, font-bold. Primary buttons use bg-primary text-black. Secondary buttons use bg-surface_high text-text_primary border border-border.
components.input: Shadcn Input, override height to h-14, bg-surface, border-border, text-text_primary. Focus ring should be primary color.
components.card: Shadcn Card, remove default shadows, set bg-surface border-border.
components.icons: lucide-react. Size 24px for standard buttons, 32px for main camera actions.
components.camera_frame: Custom HTML div with border-2 border-primary/50 border-dashed rounded-lg flex flex-col items-center justify-center h-48 bg-surface_high/50 relative. Include corner markers (crosshairs) to simulate a viewfinder.

InitialScreen.layout: Hero image background with heavy overlay (bg-black/80). Form centered.

SectorsScreen.layout: List of sectors. Header with 'Setores' and back button to edit shift details.
elements: Card list for each sector (e.g., ZARP Localiza Vermelho/Amarelo, Setor 01). Clickable to navigate.
Button: Revisar e Finalizar (Primary, fixed at bottom)

ScanScreen.layout: Header with Sector Name. Split view: Top for scanning/adding, Bottom for list of cars.
elements: Camera Viewfinder placeholder with 'Tirar Foto / Upload' button.
Manual entry form: Placa (Mono), Marca, Modelo, Cor.
List of added vehicles in this sector. Each item shows Brand, Model, Plate (Mono) and a Trash icon button.

FinalReviewScreen.layout: Header 'Resumo do Pernoite'. Text area displaying the formatted report.
elements: Pre-formatted text block (Markdown/Text format as requested) inside a disabled textarea or pre tag, using font-mono for readability.
Button: Copiar Tudo (Primary, with Check icon on success)

splash_background.description: Empty parking garage at night. Use as a fixed background for the Initial Screen with a heavy bg-[#0A0A0A]/85 overlay to ensure text contrast.

testing.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Examples: data-testid='input-colaborador', data-testid='btn-iniciar-pernoite', data-testid='sector-card-{id}', data-testid='btn-camera', data-testid='input-placa', data-testid='btn-remover-veiculo', data-testid='btn-copiar-tudo'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use JavaScript (.js/.jsx) for all React components. Do not use TypeScript (.ts/.tsx).
App must be fully responsive, focusing primarily on mobile viewports (max-w-md mx-auto container for web).
Implement the 'Camera/Upload' as a visual placeholder or a file input (accept='image/*') that simulates an AI scan by auto-filling the manual form after a brief loading state.
Store data locally (localStorage or React state context) for the 'Histórico por data' feature.
Implement the exact WhatsApp output format requested in the problem statement.
Do not use generic blue 'SaaS' colors. Strictly use the defined Tactical Dark Mode colors.
Do not use Inter for headings. Use Oswald for headings and Manrope for body text. Ensure you import them from Google Fonts in index.css or index.html.
All inputs and buttons must be large (h-14) for ease of use in the field.
